franchisor.address: 7930 Jones Branch Drive, Suite 1100, McLean, Virginia 22102

franchise_fee.refund_policy: Refundable (less $7,500 processing) if denied or withdrawn before approval

total_ongoing_fee_rate: 9% GRR minimum (royalty + program) + 4.3% Hilton Honors on eligible folio + additional distribution/technology fees

renewal.relicensing: At franchisor's sole discretion; may require materially different terms

territory.protected_area: Optional Restricted Area Provision may be negotiated; not standard

financial_performance_representation.statement: We do not make any representations about a franchisee's future financial performance or the past financial performance of company-owned or franchised outlets.

key_pending: AAAA Property Partners v. HFH LLC — breach of contract (terminated franchise)
In re Extended Stay Hotel Antitrust Litigation — IDeaS algorithm class action
Hanson Dai v. SAS Institute — IDeaS algorithm class action
Ryan Segal v. Amadeus — Amadeus data exchange class action
Jeanette Portillo v. CoStar/STR — STR data exchange class action

noncompete.during_term: May not own or be licensor/franchisor of competing brand. May own minority interest, be franchisee, or manage competitor property.

dispute_resolution.venue: U.S. District Court, Eastern District of Virginia (Alexandria) or Fairfax County, VA state court or New York, NY. Franchisor may sue where hotel is located.
dispute_resolution.arbitration: Only in Puerto Rico (AAA or JAMS)

gag_clause.statement: During the last 3 fiscal years, some current and former franchisees have signed provisions restricting their ability to speak about their experience with us.

training.gm_training: Commercial and Sales Leader program, virtual, within 90 days, up to $1,200
training.sales_training: Hilton Core Sales Skills, virtual, within 90 days, up to $600
training.brand_conference: $2,500/attendee, annual, mandatory for GM and DOS

technology.ongoing_monthly: $1,995 to $5,689 (maintenance) + $400 to $600 (connectivity) + $805 to $1,170 (Connected Room) + $828 to $1,600 (Guest Internet service) + $1,950 to $4,900 (Guest Internet circuit)
technology.refresh_cycle: OnQ every 3 years; Guest Internet every 4 years

special_risks.risk: Out-of-state dispute resolution in Virginia; backup venue in New York
Principal mark 'Canopy' historically lacked federal registration protections (now registered Oct 2024)
Multiple pending antitrust class actions involving Hilton Worldwide and hotel pricing algorithms
No renewal right — re-licensing at franchisor's sole discretion with potentially different terms
All assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral for Hilton parent debt (maturing 2025-2033)
Gag clause — some franchisees restricted from discussing experience
